codeReview.summary: ToolResultContent enum has correct variants: Text(String), Json(serde_json::Value), Error(String), Image { data: String, media_type: String }. ToolOutput uses is_error: bool and content: Vec<ToolResultContent> instead of old success/result/error fields. 490 tests pass in swell-tools and swell-orchestrator. One non-blocking stale doc comment in execution.rs line 153 mentions success:false but should say is_error:true.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Stale doc comment in execution.rs line 153 still says 'success: false' but should say 'is_error: true'

summary: Feature PASSED review. ToolResultContent enum correctly implemented with all required variants. 490 tests pass. Non-blocking stale doc comment noted.
